title: More Retail is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: More Retail is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the More Retail family as a E-commerce Executive in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
